summary: Successfully tested all fixes for Shopply auth system: 1) Frontend build working without errors (no duplicate JSX), 2) Forgot Password flow fully functional, 3) /reset-password route loads correctly, 4) All backend auth endpoints working (14/14 tests passed), 5) E2E register/login flow working. Geolocation fix with enableHighAccuracy verified in HomePage.js.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: API root endpoint working
✅ Backend: Health endpoint working
✅ Backend: User registration with unique email
✅ Backend: User login with correct credentials
✅ Backend: Login with invalid credentials returns 401
✅ Backend: /auth/me endpoint with valid token
✅ Backend: /auth/me requires authentication
✅ Backend: POST /api/auth/forgot-password - returns message + demo_token
✅ Backend: Forgot password handles non-existent email without revealing it
✅ Backend: GET /api/auth/verify-reset-token - valid token returns valid=true
✅ Backend: verify-reset-token - invalid token returns valid=false
✅ Backend: POST /api/auth/reset-password - valid token resets password
✅ Backend: reset-password - invalid token returns 400
✅ Backend: Registration with referral code grants 25 bonus points
✅ Frontend: Login page renders with email, password, 'Accedi' button
✅ Frontend: 'Password dimenticata?' link visible on login page
✅ Frontend: Clicking forgot password link shows reset email form
✅ Frontend: Forgot password form submits and shows success message 'Email Inviata!'
✅ Frontend: 'Torna al login' button returns to login view
✅ Frontend: Toggle between login/register modes works
✅ Frontend: Register form shows name field and referral code field
✅ Frontend: /reset-password route loads ResetPasswordPage
✅ Frontend: Reset password page shows 'Nessun token fornito' without token
✅ Frontend: Reset password page with valid token shows password form
✅ Frontend: Password reset with valid token shows 'Password Reimpostata!' success
✅ Frontend: E2E register -> home page redirect working
✅ Frontend: E2E login with registered credentials working
✅ Code: HomePage.js has enableHighAccuracy:true geolocation option
seed_data_creation: Test users created with TEST_ prefix for each test run
context_for_next_testing_agent: Auth system fully tested and working. Forgot password flow uses MOCKED email sending (prints to console + demo_token returned for testing). All data-testid attributes working correctly. Italian language confirmed throughout app.

mocked_apis.Password reset email: Email sending is MOCKED - backend prints reset link to console and returns demo_token in forgot-password response for testing purposes
